title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Heehee... Heeheeheehee... This would be
completely unforgivable in reality, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I've got my very own Horsegirl harem!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can recreate dreamy situations and ship
together pairs I've never seen in real life... The
possibilities are endless!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer! You're the best
partner a simp could ask for!
